name: Proximity Service
description: Generates embeddings for tool problem statements, finds semantically similar tools via vector cosine similarity, creates bidirectional proximity links, and notifies authors of newly discovered tool neighbors.

functions.name: scan_proximity
functions.description: Generate embedding for tool's problem statement and find neighbors. Uses its own DB session to avoid closed-connection issues. Returns list of similar tools above proximity threshold with similarity scores.

inputs.name: tool
inputs.description: Tool instance with id, problem_statement, name, slug, and author_id attributes

inputs.name: _db
inputs.description: Unused AsyncSession parameter (function creates its own session)

error_cases.name: EmbeddingFailure
error_cases.condition: get_embedding returns None or empty value

error_cases.name: DatabaseConnectionFailure
error_cases.condition: async_session() context manager fails to acquire connection

error_cases.name: DatabaseQueryFailure
error_cases.condition: SELECT, INSERT, or UPDATE operations fail

error_cases.name: CommitFailure
error_cases.condition: db.commit() fails due to constraint violation or transaction error

preconditions: tool.problem_statement must be a non-empty string
tool.id must be a valid UUID
Database connection must be available via async_session()
postconditions: ToolEmbedding record exists for tool.id with current embedding
ProximityLink records created for all neighbors above threshold (canonical ordering: tool_a_id < tool_b_id)
Notification records created for neighbor authors (excluding self-authored tools)
Returns empty list if embedding generation fails
Returns list of dicts with 'tool_id' (str) and 'similarity' (float, rounded to 3 decimals) for neighbors above threshold
All database changes committed before return
side_effects: Inserts ProximityLink records for new neighbors above threshold
Inserts Notification records for neighbor authors
Executes vector similarity search using cosine_distance

structured_side_effects.description: External embedding API call for tool.problem_statement
Insert proximity links for neighbors above threshold
Create notifications for neighbor tool authors
Creates new async session, executes queries, commits transaction

invariants: ProximityLink records maintain canonical ordering: tool_a_id < tool_b_id
Similarity scores are rounded to 3 decimal places in output and notification data
Proximity links are only created for similarity >= settings.proximity_threshold
Maximum of 20 nearest neighbors considered per scan
Notifications are not created for self-authored tool matches (nt.author_id != tool.author_id)
Function uses isolated database session independent of caller's session
tool_id in output is serialized as string via str(neighbor_tool_id)

data_access.rationale: Reads existing embeddings and proximity links to avoid duplicates; writes embeddings, links, and notifications. Performs vector similarity search on ToolEmbedding.embedding column.

side_effects.rationale: Cosine similarity search to find semantically similar tools
Update existing embedding or insert new one
Create proximity link only if not exists and above threshold
Notify neighbor authors of new proximity matches, excluding self-authored matches

authority.rationale: Owns the logic for generating tool embeddings, computing semantic similarity, and managing proximity relationships between tools. Authoritative source for proximity link creation and neighbor discovery.
